items.title: Coinbase swings to surprise loss amid flight from crypto, but talks up prediction markets
items.description: The crypto exchange’s stock bounced off a two-year low as it looked to ease investor worries amid a sharp crypto selloff.

items.title: Apple sees $200 billion market-cap wipeout as stock slides on AI fears
items.description: Apple reportedly is facing even more snags in its planned rollout of a more advanced version of Siri, which has been long delayed.

items.title: This trucking company is AI’s latest casualty, as its stock suffers worst day in more than 6 years
items.description: Shares of C.H. Robinson Worldwide on Thursday headed for their steepest drop ever, as investors seemed to focus their fears about AI disruption onto t...

items.title: More ‘see-through’ issues surface for Lululemon, and the stock is taking a hit
items.description: The athleisure company’s stock falls after more “see-through” complaints surfaced about a new leggings line.

items.title: Why Cisco’s stock is falling hard — and taking the tech sector with it
items.description: Arista’s stock is dropping ahead of earnings, after Cisco’s report sparked renewed fears about the impact of high memory prices.
